final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: food photography, close-up hero shot, square crop
Primary request: close-up of a Japanese tonkotsu ramen bowl with chopsticks lifting noodles, steam rising, highly appetizing
Scene/backdrop: minimal dark wooden table surface, softly blurred background
Subject: tonkotsu ramen bowl — rich milky pork bone broth, chashu pork slices, soft-boiled soy-marinated egg (halved, jammy yolk), nori sheet, chopped green onions; chopsticks mid-lift with a tangle of springy noodles
Style/medium: food photography, photorealistic
Composition/framing: close-up overhead-to-slight-angle (45°), 85mm macro lens, shallow depth of field, bokeh background
Lighting/mood: warm soft key light from upper-left, subtle rim light to highlight steam wisps, rich and inviting mood
Color palette: warm ivory broth + caramel-brown chashu + golden jammy yolk + deep green nori + bright white scallion
Materials/textures: glossy broth surface with oil droplets, tender glistening pork, silky noodle strands, matte ceramic bowl
Constraints: visible rising steam above the bowl; chopsticks must be lifting noodles as the focal action
Avoid: plastic-looking food, flat lighting, cluttered props, watermark
